subject: Optical Observation: GRB 071010

Rupak Roy, K. Misra, and S. B. Pandey=20 (ARIES, NainiTal, India, on behalf of larger Indian GRB collaboration)

We have imaged the field of Swift GRB 071010 ( Moretti et al. GCN6859) with the 1.04m telescope at NainiTal ~ 0.5 days after the burst. Observations were performed in R and I bands in poor sky conditions.

We observed the afterglow candidate in R and I bands reported by Klotz, A. et al. ( GCN 6860 ). Magnitude of=20 the OT is R ~ 20 in comparison to nearby USNO B1.0 stars.

This message can be cited.
